mode.name: mode
mode.title: Mode
mode.description: A Bob AI assistant mode definition

slug.title: Slug
slug.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the mode (e.g. my-mode)

name.title: Name
name.description: Human-readable display name for the mode. May include an emoji prefix.

description.title: Description
description.description: Short summary of what this mode does, shown in the mode picker.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Tool permission groups this mode has access to.

whenToUse.title: When To Use
whenToUse.description: Guidance for the orchestrator on when to activate this mode.

roleDefinition.title: Role Definition
roleDefinition.description: System prompt that defines the mode's persona and responsibilities.
